mapper.select:
SELECT wl.id, wl.production_line_id AS productionLineId, pl.line_name AS productionLineName, wl.area_code AS areaCode, wl.location_code AS locationCode, wl.keeper_username AS keeperUsername, wl.keeper_real_name AS keeperRealName, wl.creator_id AS creatorId, su.real_name AS creatorName, su.username AS creatorUsername, wl.created_at AS createdAt, wl.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM warehouse_location wl LEFT JOIN production_line pl ON wl.production_line_id = pl.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON wl.creator_id = su.id
AND wl.creator_id = #{creatorId}
AND wl.production_line_id = #{productionLineId}
AND wl.area_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{areaCode}, '%')
AND wl.location_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{locationCode}, '%')
AND wl.keeper_username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keeperUsername}, '%')
AND wl.keeper_real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keeperRealName}, '%')
ORDER BY wl.id DESC

SELECT id, production_line_id AS productionLineId, area_code AS areaCode, location_code AS locationCode, keeper_username AS keeperUsername, keeper_real_name AS keeperRealName, creator_id AS creatorId, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM warehouse_location WHERE id = #{id}
AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warehouse_location ( production_line_id, area_code, location_code, keeper_username, keeper_real_name, creator_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productionLineId}, #{areaCode}, #{locationCode}, #{keeperUsername}, #{keeperRealName}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
